parties.name: POLANCO, SHERRY M. 10401 SW 128 AVE MIAMI, FL 33186

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sherry Polanco appeared via zoom, in pro per.

Ms. Polanco explained to the Court, that she never got a marriage certificate from County of San Francisco, that the place of marriage at the Church of the Epiphany never gave her a copy of the signed marriage certificate by the pastor, and that Church explained that there was a fire and no longer had proof of a copy of her marriage certificate. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
